Seasonal Lab

Privacy Policy

Privacy policy for Seasonal Observatory.

This static site currently has no account system, no comment system, and no reader profile collection. The hosting platform may retain basic access logs for security, performance, and troubleshooting.

If Google AdSense, analytics, or an email subscription feature is added later, this page will be updated before launch with cookie use, third-party services, data categories, and opt-out information.

If Google AdSense is enabled, Google and its partners may use cookies, advertising identifiers, IP addresses, and similar technologies to deliver, measure, or personalize ads. Readers can review Google's partner sites policy and manage preferences through browser settings or Google ad settings.

Seasonal Observatory

Original seasonal field notes, source cards, and city-scale observation guides for a long-term solar-terms site.
